blocks.content:
Congratulations on completing this journey! Job well done!

We hope you've enjoyed traveling with us as you:

- Tagged your collectors with `env` attributes to group them by environment
- Rolled out a configuration pipeline to dev collectors using regex matching
- Expanded the rollout incrementally to staging and then production
- Learned how to instantly halt a rollout by deactivating a pipeline

---

### More to explore (optional)

The world is your oyster! Read more about how you can:

- [Streamline your workflows with A/B testing, canary deployments, and blue-green environments](/docs/grafana-cloud/send-data/fleet-management/streamline-workflows/)
- [View pipeline history and restore previous versions](/docs/grafana-cloud/send-data/fleet-management/manage-fleet/pipelines/view-pipeline-history/)

---

### Related paths

Consider taking the following paths after you complete this journey:

- [Monitor collector health using Fleet Management](/docs/learning-paths/fleet-mgt-monitor-health/)
